content:
{
  "artifact_type": "blueprint_design_doc",
  "depth_tier": "D2_PRODUCTION",
  "runtime_target": "Codex",
  "should_block": false,
  "blocked_reason": null,
  "compiled_intent": {
    "Objective": "Design a governed blueprint for finance operations in Latin America, using a compliance lens, that can be compiled by SR8 into a deployable artifact with explicit validation gates.",
    "Scope": "Covers finance operations workflows (e.g., transaction processing, reconciliation, reporting) for an enterprise in Latin America, incorporating local regulatory compliance (e.g., tax, anti-money laundering, data privacy). Includes validation gates at each stage to ensure compliance before proceeding.",
    "Constraints": [
      "Must comply with Latin American financial regulations (e.g., SAT in Mexico, SUNAT in Peru, RFB in Brazil).",
      "Must include explicit validation gates (e.g., compliance checkpoints, audit trails).",
      "Must be implementable on Codex runtime.",
      "Must handle overbroad one-pass lock scenario (i.e., single pass through all gates without branching).",
      "Must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "Blueprint document contains all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.",
      "Each finance operation step has a corresponding validation gate defined.",
      "Validation gates are testable and auditable.",
      "Artifact can be directly compiled by SR8 without manual intervention."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "format": "blueprint_design_doc",
      "sections": [
        "Objective",
        "Scope",
        "Constraints",
        "Success Criteria",
        "Output Contract"
      ],
      "validation_gates": [
        "Gate 1: Input validation (transaction data completeness and format)",
        "Gate 2: Regulatory compliance check (local tax and AML rules)",
        "Gate 3: Authorization and approval workflow",
        "Gate 4: Audit trail generation and logging",
        "Gate 5: Final reconciliation and reporting"
      ],
      "runtime": "Codex",
      "compliance_lens": "Latin America financial regulations"
    }
  }
}
